prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock Ford 351 Cleveland (CJ-4V) with a fully built 351C-4V featuring a forged rotating assembly from Eagle Specialty Products (ESP 3.000" stroker crank, ESP H-beam connecting rods, and Mahle forged pistons with 11.5:1 compression). Pair with a custom camshaft from Comp Cams (242/248 duration, .600/.600 lift, 114 LSA) for aggressive mid-to-high RPM power delivery.

Forced Induction: Install a ProCharger F-1X centrifugal supercharger system (12 psi max boost) with a custom intercooler setup from Spearco (front-mount, 1000 CFM core) and a custom fuel system upgrade (dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, ID1000 injectors, and a Holley Dominator ECU for precise tuning).

Exhaust: Fabricate a custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust system with equal-length headers from Burns Stainless (1.75" primary tubes, 32" collectors) and a MagnaFlow 14815 stainless steel muffler for a deep, aggressive tone without drone. Pair with a custom X-pipe for optimized scavenging.
estetica: Body Kit: Install a custom widebody conversion kit from Liberty Walk (LB Works Pantera-specific kit) with extended fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts for an aggressive stance. Paint in a custom matte Viola Micalizzato (PPG DBC-9800) with gloss black accents.

Wheels: Fit custom 18x10.5" (front) and 18x12" (rear) BBS LM-R wheels in gold with a 5x112 bolt pattern, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear) for maximum grip.

Interior: Replace the stock interior with a full Alcantara retrim by Katzkin, featuring custom embroidered De Tomaso logos on the headrests. Install a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) with integrated harness bar and Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Add a digital dash from AIM MXS Strada with a custom Pantera-themed layout.
